Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x164E "WARP-1543-164E" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3e sta $01 jsr $1543 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Warp (Creative Software).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The routine at $1543 displays the loading screen. However, to avoid calling the disk loading routines after this is displayed, the following changes were made: 1. The JSR $13B0 instruction at $162B was changed to JMP $1000 instead 2. Added a routine at $1000 which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game
